rulings.Case Title: C. EDWARD SCHRADER VS. NARINDER SANGHA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Issue Evidence And Contempt Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, January 19, 2011, line 2. PLAINTIFF C. EDWARD SCHRADER's Motion For Issue Evidence And Contempt Sanctions. Motion to establish twelve designated facts and prohibiting defendant from opposing their truthfulness or validity granted. Also, order prohibiting defendant from introducing his cell phone records for the period of March 16, 2009 to July 29, 2009 is granted. Motion for contempt sanctions denied because Plaintiff has not followed proper procedures for the request. = (302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BAYLY VS. WESTERN MARINE SERVICES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash, Limit Or Modify Subpoenas Issued By Deft For Release Of Pltf'S Insurance Records
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, January 19, 2011, line 3. PLAINTIFF DAVID BAYLY's Motion To Quash, Limit Or Modify Subpoenas Issued By Defendant For Release Of Plaintiff's Insurance Records. Motion to Quash Subpoenas denied. Motion to limit or modify granted. Subpoenas modified as follows: Records to be produced in indicated claims. 1) That contain or reflect non-privileged statements by David Bayly related to facts surrounding those specific claims. 2) Non-privileged statements made about David Bayly or on his behalf related to those specific claims. 3) That contain or reflect injuries suffered by David Bayly similar to the injuries claimed in this current matter. 4) That contain or reflect any pre-existing injuries suffered by David Bayly prior to the claims designated with the aforementioned claim number that are similar to the injuries claimed in this matter. 5) Any settlement received by David Bayly; 6) Any settlement demand made by David Bayly. = (302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT GENOVA et al VS. CSRWARE, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 19, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANTS CSRWARE, INC. AND KAREN ALONARDO'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS MADE A SUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT THE MULTI-FACTOR TEST TO GUESS THEIR CLAIM OF WAIVER HAS BEEN MET, INCLUDING PREJUDICE TO THE PLAINTIFF DUE TO THE DELAY. (ST. AGNES MEDICAL CENTER V. PACIFICARE OF CALIFORNIA (2003) 31 CAL.4TH 1187) =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: DEAN BALLBACK et al VS. THOMAS H ROBERTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 19, 2011, line 4, DEFENDANTS THOMAS ROBERTS, LON MURPHY, MASON-MCDUFFIE REAL ESTATE, INC. FKA PRUDENTIAL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD TERMS OF CONTRACT AND BREACH MORE CLEARLY. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD WITH MORE PARTICULARITY. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD THAT BREACHES AROSE FROM BROKER RELATIONSHIP OR OTHER FACTS INDICATING THE EXISTENCE OF A FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENCE PER SE AND CONSPIRACY AS THEY ARE NOT CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD HIS CONSPIRACY ALLEGATIONS AS A GENERAL CHARGING ALLEGATION. SEE JOHNSON V. HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL (2009) 179 CAL.APP.4TH 549, 555-556; OKUN V. SUPERIOR COURT (MAPLE PROPERTIES) (1981) 29 CAL.3RD 442, 454. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW S. PARK et al VS. R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING L.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 19, 2011, line 14, DEFENDANTS R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING L.P., THE RITZ-CARLTON HOTEL COMPANY, LLC, THE RITZ-CARLTON DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, INC., THE RITZ-CARLTON SALES COMPANY, INC., THE RITZ-CARLTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND & 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS NEED TO PLEAD FACTS THAT BRING THESE CAUSES OF ACTION WITHIN THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS OR FACTS SHOWING WHY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS DOES NOT APPLY. AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. WHILE DAMAGES ARE NOT STATED IN THIS CAUSE OF ACTION, THEY ARE STATED ELSEWHERE AND INCORPORATED IN PRECEDING PARAGRAPHS WHICH IS SUFFICIENT. AS TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. THE PLAINTIFFS HAVE ALLEGED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT THE CAUSE OF ACTION. AS TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. WHILE CIVIL CONSPIRACY IS NOT A SEPARATE CAUSE OF ACTION, IT CAN BE PLED AND PROVEN SEPARATELY. AS TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. THE PLAINTIFFS DESCRIBE ACTS OF THE DEFENDANTS THAT MAY CONSTITUTE A VIOLATION OF THE UCL. AS TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFFS HAVE STATED FACTS REGARDING DEFENDANTS ALLEGED UNCONSCIONABILITY. WHETHER THESE ARE SUFFICIENT TO FIND FOR DEFENDANT IS A QUESTION OF FACT NOT TO BE DETERMINED ON A DEMURRER. AS TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. WHILE DEFENDANT IS CORRECT THAT THERE IS NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT, IT IS SUFFICIENT TO HAVE STATED IT AS A FORM OF RELIEF-RESTITUTION. AS TO THE 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE TENDER. AS TO THE 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. AS TO THE 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THERE ARE NO FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS SPECIFIC TO THE RITZ-CARLTON. AS TO THE 15TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS OVERR
